verse.es: "Que todo su ser, espiritu, alma y cuerpo, sea conservado irreprensible."
verse.en: "May your whole spirit, soul and body be kept blameless at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ."

es: Día 30. Integrar no es unificar para que todo sea perfecto. Es aceptar que cuerpo, mente y espíritu pueden estar desalineados y aun así ser TU, entero.
Tu cuerpo dice "duele". Tu mente dice "está mal". Tu espíritu dice "sigue". Tres voces contrarias. A eso le llamamos integración: poder llevar todo eso dentro sin explotar.
La Escritura de hoy dice: "Que tu espíritu, alma y cuerpo sean guardados completamente." No significa armonia. Significa custodia. Protecciona todo lo que eres, aunque sea contradictorio.
La salud integral no es equilibrio perfecto. Es aprender a convivir con las contradicciones. El cuerpo que duele y la mente que suena. El miedo y la esperanza juntos. Es humanidad.
Hoy honra la totalidad de ti. No esperes arreglarte completamente. Eres completo AHORA, así, quebrado. El Señor integra lo que no puede ser arreglado. Lo hace familia dentro de ti.
en: Day 30. Integrating is not unifying so everything is perfect. It is accepting that body, mind and spirit can be misaligned and still be YOU, whole.

Your body says "it hurts." Your mind says "something is wrong." Your spirit says "keep going." Three opposing voices. That is what we call integration: being able to carry all of that inside without exploding.
Today's Scripture says: "May your whole spirit, soul and body be kept blameless." It does not mean harmony. It means custody. Guard all that you are, even though it is contradictory.
Integral health is not perfect balance. It is learning to coexist with contradictions. The body that hurts and the mind that dreams. Fear and hope together. It is humanity.
Today honor all of you. Do not expect to fix yourself completely. You are complete NOW, like this, broken. The Lord integrates what cannot be fixed. He makes it family within you.

prayer.es: Jesus misericordioso, pongo en Tus manos mi salud fisica, mental y espiritual. Restaura lo que esta herido, fortalece lo que esta debil y guiame por caminos de vida plena. Dame sabiduria para cuidarme, humildad para pedir ayuda y esperanza para no rendirme. Amen.
prayer.en: Merciful Jesus, I place my physical, mental, and spiritual health in Your hands. Restore what is wounded, strengthen what is weak, and guide me on paths of abundant life. Give me wisdom to care for myself, humility to ask for help, and hope to keep going. Amen.

act.es: Hoy haz una accion concreta de cuidado integral: hidratarte mejor, caminar, descansar a tiempo, reducir pantalla, pedir acompanamiento o rezar diez minutos en silencio por tu sanacion.
act.en: Today do one concrete act of integral care: hydrate better, walk, rest on time, reduce screen time, ask for support, or pray ten minutes in silence for your healing.
